meta.description: Large-scale English-only America's Auto Auction textual review/problem dataset from public web sources (recency-first).

reviews.author: Michael Campbell
reviews.review_text: Biggest joke of an auction, went at 745am on auction day. They don’t have keys on cars to look at them, 70% of the cars I was looking at were locked. Don’t waste your time here Along with OUTRAGEOUS buy fees. Works out to be 3-4x in buy fees than any other auction

reviews.author: Denis Carvalho
reviews.review_text: Fees for either buyer and sellers are insanely high, and undisclosed when even asked if you are a seller.

reviews.author: David Schmucker
reviews.review_text: Would not recommend. Staff is incredible dude and was yelling at me when making a delivery.

reviews.author: Nadeem Akbar Khan
reviews.review_text: Miss Olivia is the best!!!!! Always there to help very humble!!! America’s Auto Auction is a great place to do business! Very organized, professional staff, and the process is always smooth. The team is helpful, communication is clear, and they make buying and selling vehicles easy. Inventory selection is solid and transactions are handled efficiently. Highly recommend for any dealers looking for a reliable auction! Love New Age Auto Sales.

reviews.author: Erick Respert
reviews.review_text: Very clean and organized auction! Great experience! The team is very helpful as well..

reviews.author: BBB complainant
reviews.review_text: Sales and Advertising Issues. On 10/9/25 bought a car from America's Auto Auction St. Louis . I have been trying to retrieve the title. When I checked online, it told me that my title is at the auction, but when I went to pick it up, it was not there. When I spoke to Angel REMOVED manager) she tells me that they cannot get the title because it has a lein on it and that I need to speak with the General manager ( REMOVED ). When I stated to her that the car should not have been sold without a clean title and that I have spent $2300 in parts and labor for the car, she then tells me that I should have never started working on it until I had the title in my hand, as if I was to blame. Now I am getting the run around from Angel REMOVED manager) who now keeps avoiding my calls. At this point, I don't beleive that she has been relaying my messages to the General manager because no one has reached out to me to have this issue resolved. Customer Answer Date: 02/13/2026 This complaint was resolved by the business.

reviews.review_text: I am a dealer and have been doing business with this auction for over 25 years before it was changed from tri state and the way I was treated by Julie K was not professional and very wrong I bout a car and sold it and and proof of sale and dated titled when sold she did not want to see it and barred my business from making any purchases and made me pay for tickets tickets that was caused by the buyer who bought the car and told me I responsible for someone else actions and wouldn't let me talk maria or Larry's she instructed... read more

reviews.author: BBB complainant
reviews.review_text: Billing Issues. On 6/26/25 I was issued a check Americas Auto Auction for a vehicle I sold. On 6/27/25, I picked the check up from the auction. I deposited the check on 6/30/25. On 7/3/25 I was alerted by my bank that the check had been returned. I contacted Americas Auto Auction and spoke to someone in accounting who told me that the vehicle was bought back and REMOVED said to stop payment on the check. I attempted to reach REMOVED and have been unsuccessful. I dont know why the vehicle was bought back considering all sales are final. I would not have been able to pick up the check had I not satisfied the requirements on my end. It seems this business is operating using discriminatory business practices and rules that apply to some, dont apply to all. I did not even receive a courtesy call letting me know that he was stopping payment on the check, so I have incurred additional fees by my bank. I operate a small business, so every dime matters to me.
